changelog: Added fast project reassignment inside payment editing with searchable project, client, and invoice lookup.
Payments now keep invoice numbers for easier tracking, filtering, and safer project-linked updates.
Refined dashboard activity and notification UI for clearer operation details and cleaner layout behavior.
Verified fresh Windows release build and installer generation for the new update package.
Validated project with automated tests before publishing the update.
notes_ar: هذا التحديث يحسن إدارة الدفعات وربطها بالفواتير والمشاريع، ويصقل واجهات الإشعارات ولوحة التحكم مع تجهيز مثبت جديد قابل للتثبيت.
notes_en: This update improves payment-to-project and invoice tracking, refines notification and dashboard UI, and ships a freshly verified Windows installer.
